supersedes_unaccepted_approach.reason: In-place mutation of the historical v2 profile invalidated immutable R04E dependency verification at exact-head CI 29705129284.

objective: Restore historical provider profile v2 byte-for-byte, add a new v3 profile containing only the DeepSeek Pro visible-output option change, make v3 the connected-worker default while preserving explicit v1/v2 validation, and rebind the Agent-5 runtime policy to exact v3/tool hashes.

Agent-5 runtime policy binds exact v3 and tool hashes without tools/provenance mutation

no-cache exact linux/arm64 connected-worker image build and dependency validation
